title: Water Technical Access Portal (WaterTAP)
name: Water Technical Access Portal (WaterTAP)
statement_of_work: On behalf of the California State Water Resources Control Board (SWRCB), the California Department of Technology seeks proposals from qualified bidders to provide a cloud-based SaaS solution for the Water Technical Access Portal (WaterTAP). These services will include development, design, and implementation of the WaterTAP solution, software licensing and maintenance, and optional post-implementation services. The WaterTAP solution will replace legacy systems with a configurable, cloud-based Software as a Service (SaaS) solution that will be an enterprise-level data system which aims to minimize customization and:. Address current and future information and business needs.
deliverables: Deliver implementation of the WaterTAP solution
dept: California State Water Resources Control Board
description: On behalf of the California State Water Resources Control Board (SWRCB), the California Department of Technology seeks proposals from qualified bidders to provide a cloud-based SaaS solution for the Water Technical Access Portal (WaterTAP). These services will include development, design, and implementation of the WaterTAP solution, software licensing and maintenance, and optional post-implementation services. The WaterTAP solution will replace legacy systems with a configurable, cloud-based Software as a Service (SaaS) solution that will be an enterprise-level data system which aims to minimize customization and:. Address current and future information and business needs. Maintain an overarching architecture to connect existing foundational data systems.
